name: Peaches Poached in White Wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the orange and lemon into thin pieces.
2. Place the peaches in a single layer in a casserole dish. Add the water, white wine, sugar, and vanilla pod. Arrange the orange and lemon slices over the peaches. The liquid should barely cover the fruit.
3. Cover the casserole with wax paper cut to fit. Make a small hole in the center of the wax paper.
4. Bring the fruit to a boil. Skim any foam that rises to the surface.
5. Reduce heat until one bubble breaks at the top of the dish. Place the wax paper over the peaches and simmer for approximately 20 minutes. Turn off the heat and let the peaches cool in the syrup.
6. Remove the peaches from the syrup with a slotted spoon. Peel off the skins. Place the peaches in a glass bowl. Pour the strained syrup over the top. Cover and refrigerate for at least six hours.
